results.title: 10 Best Customer.io Alternatives: In-Depth Comparison | Maestra
results.content:
Emarsys (now SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement) is a long-standing player in the marketing automation space, particularly known in Europe and among enterprise retail brands. Now under SAP’s umbrella, Emarsys positions itself as a fully integrated omnichannel customer engagement platform for B2C businesses. It’s the engine behind many big retail and e-commerce loyalty communications, and it stands out for offering industry-specific solutions and AI features. If you’re a sizeable retailer or global brand, Emarsys is likely on your radar as an alternative to both Customer.io and the likes of Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

Image

Emarsys’s flow builder

# 10 Best Customer.io Alternatives: Smarter Customer Engagement

Last updated: May 2026

While Customer.io offers solid functionality for basic messaging workflows, ambitious marketing teams often hit limitations: disconnected customer data, missing channels, limited personalization capabilities, or simply the need for more strategic support as their programs mature.

The Complete Guide to Selecting Marketing Automation Software [...] Mobile App Engagement: Braze and Iterable are top-notch for in-app messaging and push notifications at scale, ensuring your mobile users stay hooked. MoEngage and OneSignal also focus here, offering push-centric engagement (MoEngage even adds WhatsApp).
 Email & SMS Marketing for E-commerce: Klaviyo stands out for email/SMS tailored to online stores, and ActiveCampaign offers affordable, flexible email automation for smaller teams. These tools understand how to get a message into a customer’s inbox (or phone) effectively.
 Omnichannel Personalization & AI: SAP Emarsys and Bloomreach Engagement (Exponea) lead with AI-driven segmentation, predictions, and personalization, ideal for data-hungry marketers who want to leverage big data and AI models in their campaigns.

results.title: The 7 best AI powered marketing automation tools - Customer.io
results.content:
### Segment

Best for: AI-powered customer data foundation

Segment creates unified customer profiles that power smarter automation across every other tool you use. Their Personas feature uses AI to automatically identify behavioral segments, while predictive traits help you anticipate customer needs before they express them. When your automation tools have better data, they make better decisions.

Why it stands out: Provides the data foundation that makes all your other marketing automation more intelligent and effective.

### Zapier

# The 7 best AI powered marketing automation tools

Discover the AI-powered marketing automation tools that actually enhance your expertise instead of replacing it with generic suggestions and black-box algorithms.

Molly Evola

Molly Evola

Sr. Content Marketing Manager

logos of best ai marketing automation tools like amplitude, customer.io, and mixpanel

In this article

Marketing teams are under more pressure than ever. You're expected to personalize at scale, optimize across multiple channels, prove ROI on everything, and somehow do it all faster than before. The old approach of throwing more hours or more people at the problem isn't sustainable. [...] ## The AI-powered marketing automation tools that actually deliver

### Amplitude

Best for: Behavioral insights that trigger meaningful automation

Amplitude turns product usage data into actionable automation triggers. Their AI can spot which user actions predict upgrades, identify early churn signals, and recommend the best moments for outreach. Instead of automating based on time or demographics, you can automate based on what customers actually do.

Why it stands out: Enables behavior-driven automation that responds to real customer actions rather than assumptions.

### Customer.io

Best for: Complete AI-powered customer engagement across all channels
